hero.bio1: Computer Science student at FER, Zagreb.
hero.bio2: Former Software Developer at Ericsson Nikola Tesla.

about.heading: Digital solutions at the intersection of design and top-tier engineering
about.para1: I help companies transform ideas into functional products.
about.para2: With experience at a leading regional tech company, as a freelance developer I offer:
about.service2Desc: Connecting your business with modern services.
about.bento1Desc: Future me always thanks present me. I write code that's easy to read and even easier to extend.
about.bento2Desc: Sovereign at every layer of the stack. I combine visual perfection with powerful server-side solutions.
about.bento3Desc: Every millisecond matters. I optimize bundles, rendering and databases for an instant experience.
about.bento4Desc: Fluent English and engineering ethics gained at leading global tech corporations.
about.bento5Desc: FER background as a guarantee of engineering discipline and ability to solve the most complex problems.

experience.intro: Software Engineer with experience at Ericsson and custom web application development. I combine engineering precision with freelance speed to deliver solutions that work.
experience.job1B1: Delivery of robust software modules meeting strict enterprise quality standards.
experience.job1B2: Application of Best-Practice Git workflows and agile methodologies to maintain high delivery velocity.
experience.job1B3: Upholding high code standards through participation in code reviews and feature optimization.
experience.job1B4: Architectural contributions in collaboration with experienced engineers on future-proof system solutions.
experience.job2B1: Full-stack Development: Engineering approach to building applications using React and complex SQL/API architectures.
experience.job2B2: UI/UX Engineering: Development of interactive, pixel-perfect interfaces ensuring a seamless user experience.
experience.job2B3: Project Leadership: Independent management of all development phases, ensuring system stability and clean documentation.
experience.job2B4: Client Management: Direct collaboration and advising clients on selecting the optimal technology for their growth.

education.deg1School: Faculty of Electrical Engineering and Computing (FER)
education.deg2School: Faculty of Electrical Engineering and Computing (FER)
education.deg2Spec: University of Zagreb · univ. bacc. ing. comp.

projects.sectionIntro: From initial concept to scalable production: Four original projects driven by real market demands and clean engineering logic.
projects.p1Desc: Custom web solution for the Sottomonte agency: Building a high-performance responsive system. Advanced SEO optimization and a custom layout designed for maximum conversion and loading speed.
projects.p2Desc: Custom web solution for presenting premium accommodation on the Pelješac peninsula. System designed focusing on visual content loading speed and responsive design ensuring ease of booking on all devices.
projects.p3Desc: Sabioncello: From design concept to a complete destination guide. Development of a modern and scalable web solution optimized for an international audience, with emphasis on visual storytelling and technical SEO excellence.
projects.p4Desc: Coming Soon: Sabioncello Graphics Web App. Designing a scalable ecosystem for graphic services. From architecture design to final code polishing — in the process of building something great.

contact.tagline1: Let's connect. I'm available for freelance inquiries and full-time engagements.
contact.tagline2: For collaboration details and quick communication, write me an email.
